S.FORM: Jos√© Eduardo dos Santos I 1942 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jos√© Eduardo dos Santos, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Angola anini i ci Jos√© Eduardo dos Santos, patirengan a romi'ad i 1979 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 10 a romi'ad.
